transformationMoves: Replace abstract system-summary lines with nearby prison, road, or city infrastructure.
Turn deduction blocks into tactile POV reads anchored in stone, iron, air, and posture.
Keep dialogue grounded with load-bearing beats that reveal pressure, rank, or environment.
Use recurring material details as continuity anchors so revelations stay inside the room.
Stop recognition beats at the first usable insight instead of letting them swell cosmic.

scenes.title: Through the Wall
scenes.biggestGap: A few lines step out of the cell into reportorial summary instead of keeping the blade threat prison-bounded and bodily.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Adjacent palace cells below the evidence vault, with threat and information moving through stone instead of open space.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Flagstones, mortar seam, wrist irons, cot frame, grit, and the prison cold must keep the exchange physical.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads Frostmourne as magical structure and hostile rhythm, then forces that theory down into road-useful speech for Sylvanas.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Each longer wall exchange needs a contact beat: chain scrape, palm to stone, cot movement, or pulse timing shift.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The closing beat must stay bound to the blade's accelerating countdown through palace stone.

scenes.title: The Visitor
scenes.biggestGap: The visitor's scale reveal sometimes slips into polished campaign summary or cosmic abstraction instead of staying embodied and tactically usable.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: A palace cell so small the visitor's size changes the room, with the corridor threshold and barred door staying legible throughout.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Threshold light, torch pitch, bars, flagstones, chain pull, cot frame, and remembered road textures must carry the scene.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the visitor like a battlefield problem first: weight, air, reach, exits, disguises, and the one habit it failed to kill.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Every long exchange with the visitor needs bodily or environmental pressure nearby, not polished exposition hanging in air.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The farewell clue must lock into concrete remembered surfaces and pass outward as usable prison intel, not abstract lore.
